targets.boundary: Entire carbon footprint (including products and supply chain)
targets.notes: Apple states it will cut emissions by 75% by 2030 and address remaining emissions with carbon removal.
targets.title: Reduce greenhouse gas emissions 75% by 2030 (Apple 2030)

targets.boundary: Entire carbon footprint (including products and supply chain)
targets.notes: Apple’s stated goal is to be carbon neutral across its business, manufacturing supply chain, and product life cycle by 2030, using emissions reductions and carbon removal for residual emissions.
targets.title: Carbon neutral across entire carbon footprint by 2030 (Apple 2030)
